hero.title: Software Engineering & Backend Architecture 🚀
hero.description: I'm Wistant, a Senior Software Engineer & Software Architect. I design and deploy highly scalable web platforms across the TypeScript ecosystem (NestJS, Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis).

about.title: My Philosophy
about.content: With over 2 years in the field, I've learned that software is just a tool—the true solution is what matters. I approach every project with the mindset of an architect, designing robust systems that bridge the gap between complex engineering and human needs.

seo.title: About Wistant | TypeScript Architect & Full-Stack Engineer

seo.keywords: TypeScript Architect, Full-Stack Engineer Cameroon, NestJS Expert Douala, Next.js Developer, Prisma ORM, Redis Integration, Senior Backend Engineer
